textByHash.035fe16bf4241a23d2c08a9b199516c8fae928e2: Stop distractin' me, go chop dem troys!
textByHash.1f65356a5eb87bb66f9145738407d5b4f486be04: Remember this, yow need to know wot you can do so ya know what to learn. Now off ya go!
textByHash.23c9ff0961e9083f544d886622c9f9c574b2b030: Wew done. I see you do have a good command ov yur abilitoys.
textByHash.3f2b835eca72e5cd66614f9fd9c69784dc5cbe82: Well, ya. Hey, bet you canna chop dem troys.
textByHash.4208b02f2b903f521c702037ae54a0babc9d5ff1: Har har, I did beet ya. You ain't gat no skiws.
textByHash.57c43f701604ef16165e105092c82ebf17f446df: Why ello young madam. Do yow like me troys?
textByHash.5a8c90225c80bb08884effb6bf0b6348df42bb14: Ya, chop logs and pile em int centar. First ta twenty wins.
textByHash.8595a6d1823d00f0958bfb9b9b8dfb2049b99466: We ow you gonna chop dem troys? I can give yow a bronze axe, but nowt more.
textByHash.a9a4f868ef95d005e075a3a1182d7fbfd3461284: Dat's two more logs from dem troys.
textByHash.b32265862dcbb09d9693c7924287c2fb010417b5: Ah new ya wud. Best ya gow back den.
textByHash.c63e9848195d0b4bbde78569996c7eb243792600: Ok, chop logs and pile em int centar. First ta twenty wins.
textByHash.d13b6102ea472520ee317f3c393785ef2ff3a2a0: Why ello young sir. Do yow like me troys?
textByHash.f678c404399bd1f1512e3dde25e6c1e697e6dfd2: Ya dunno? Wew you godda know what yow can dow. Ow can you judge wot you need ta practice or learn?
